# The Sonic Roast - Full LLM Context

The Sonic Roast is a coffee podcast website.

## What This Site Contains
- Homepage with latest episode highlight and recent episodes.
- Archive page with episode cards and filtering UI.
- Episode page with show notes, timestamps, and audio player UI.
- About page with team and mission details.

## Key Routes
- / : Landing page and highlighted content.
- /archive : Archive browsing for episodes.
- /episode/1 : Episode detail view currently linked by the site UI.
- /about : Team and mission information.

## Content Intent
This site is intended to be discoverable by search bots and LLM-based retrieval systems.

## Crawl Policy Summary
Refer to /robots.txt for crawler rules.

## Machine-Readable Indexes
- /sitemap.xml
- /llms.txt
